verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How to reach the masses, men of every birth? For an answer Jesus gave a key, "And I, if I be lifted up from the earth, Will draw all men unto me."

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lift Him up, Still He speaks from eternity, "And I, if I be lifted up from the earth, Will draw all men unto me."

verse.name: v3
v4
verse.lines: Don't exalt the preacher, don't exalt the pew, Preach the Gospel simple, full and free; Prove Him and you will find that promise is true, "I'll draw all men unto me."

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lift Him up by living as a Christian ought, Let the world in you the Saviour see, Then men will gladly follow Him who once taught, "I'll draw all men unto me."
